metadata.description: Citizen journey maps showing how people move between government organisations during major life events. Each journey represents a real end-to-end process that citizens navigate, derived from GOV.UK step-by-step guides and published service paths.
metadata.edge_meaning: An edge from org A to org B means a citizen completing this journey must interact with org A, then subsequently with org B. This represents a handoff in the citizen experience.

journeys.name: Start a limited company
journeys.description: The end-to-end journey of setting up a private limited company in the UK, from choosing a structure through to trading.

steps.action: Check if a limited company is right for you
Choose company name and check availability
Register your company with Companies House
Register for Corporation Tax with HMRC
Register for VAT (if turnover over threshold)
Apply for relevant licences (e.g. food, alcohol, premises)

services: Estimate your Self Assessment tax bill

steps.action: File annual accounts and tax return
services: File your accounts and Company Tax Return

handoff_edges.from_action: Check if a limited company is right for you

handoff_edges.from_action: Choose company name and check availability
